item.description: Things could have been so much easier for Australia but their cause still hasn’t been helped by an unusual decision.

item.description: The leader of the Nationals party is stepping down suddenly admitting it’s ‘time for me to feel normal again’.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Police respond to active shooting at synagogue in Michigan, US
item.description: A truck has crashed into a synagogue in Michigan and smoke is visible from the roof, local media reports say.

item.title: Queensland e-bike and motorcycle crash kills two teenagers in Greenbank
item.description: A motorcycle collided with the e-bike, which is believed to have not had headlights on.

item.title: Iran, Israel and US war live updates: US President Donald Trump says five Iranian National Women’s Soccer Team players reportedly granted asylum in Australia
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: NRL superstar Reece Walsh again in the spotlight after Broncos shock loss to Parramatta
item.description: The Broncos superstar has been accused of ‘clocking off’ and finishing the night early.

item.title: Teenager killed as stolen car with up to seven occupants allegedly going 180km/h crashes in Hoppers Crossing
item.description: ‘This is not a PlayStation game where you can hit reset and start again.’

item.title: Aussie internationals overlooked in Hundred auction but Matt Short gets snapped up late
item.description: Unlike their female counterparts, Australia’s cricket men weren’t in demand.

item.title: Two brothers shot multiple times during massive brawl in Western Sydney
item.description: The fight involved about 15 people.

item.title: Victorian dad wins $50 million Powerball jackpot while watching the AFL on his couch
item.description: He was on his couch watching AFL when the email rolled in.

item.title: Mel Schilling cancer diagnosis: TV star and dating coach reveals there’s nothing left for doctors to do in sad health update
item.description: ‘My light is starting to fade — and quickly.’

item.title: Man charged with manslaughter after allegedly fatal fight on a worksite in Gymea
item.description: Police were called to the hospital when it was discovered his fatal injuries were not consistent with a fall.

item.title: 2026 GAC Aion UT pricing: EV hatch now arriving with special drive-away offers
item.description: Chinese brand GAC's new small electric hatchback is cheaper than a Toyota Corolla, with special launch prices further sweetening the pot.

item.title: Nicole Kidman, Keith Urban: The Practical Magic 2 star addresses divorce for the first time
item.description: The Australian actress and country music singer finalised their divorce in January after 19 years of marriage.

item.title: 2026 Tesla Model Y L prices: Six-seat EV on sale in Australia and New Zealand
item.description: Australia and New Zealand are the first export markets to get the new Model Y L, which will be offered in a single spec from $74,900.

item.title: Eliud Kipchoge announces Melbourne Marathon Festival as third stop on world tour
item.description: The Olympic legend is coming to our shores in a ‘landmark moment’ for Australian running.

item.title: Sydney priest reignites boxing challenge to former prime minister Tony Abbott after pro-Palestine rally clash
item.description: Father Dave Smith has challenged Tony Abbott to a charity boxing match.

item.title: Richmond mid Jacob Hopper urged to lift after disappointing opener against Carlton: ‘Can’t hide him’
item.description: While a veteran forward was tormenting his own fans, a less obvious ‘issue’ was lurking.

item.title: Australian Idol 2026: Meet the singers who have secured a spot in this year’s Top 12
item.description: The judges have chosen and now the contestants are fighting to keep their dreams alive.

item.title: 2026 Tesla Model Y L price and specs
item.description: Tesla's stretched, six-seat Model Y variant is now reaching Australian showrooms, priced from $74,900 before on-road costs.

item.title: Noma’s Michelin-star chef Rene Redzepi steps back after admitting past mistreatment of staff
item.description: The star chef behind the world-renowned restaurant said he is leaving daily operations ‘effective immediately’.

item.title: Brisbane call on Darragh Joyce as emergency for Round 1 after hospital stint in wake of early-season adversity
item.description: The two-time reigning premiers have rushed a veteran from hospital to their team sheet for this weekend.

item.title: Inquest to hear why 8-year-old Elizabeth Rose Struhs was returned to her killer parents despite ‘cult’ warnings
item.description: Authorities knew of a family’s extreme religious beliefs against medical treatment years before a little girl died, a coroner has heard.

item.title: Bluesfest Byron Bay cancelled: Major music festival announces ‘difficult decision’ weeks before it was due to take place
item.description: Thousands of people were just weeks out from heading to Bluesfest before getting the bad news on Friday.

item.title: 2026 Mazda BT-50 prices: Thunder rolls in again, Boss shows up for work
item.description: Another safety feature has been added to the spec list of certain Mazda BT-50s, while new Boss and Thunder variants join the range.

item.title: New North Melbourne captain Nick Larkey drops truth bomb on club’s very slow rebuild
item.description: The ‘frank’ admission has come on the eve of his team’s first game, clearly spelling out what everyone thinks.

item.title: Mazda moves to block Ferrari with trademark filing
item.description: As Mazda stakes its claim on the Luce name, is the Japanese brand looking to obstruct Ferrari, or is it a sign of a future model?

item.title: ‘Real anxiety in the community’: Fuel uncertainty hits regional families and farms - and most likely family dinner tables
item.description: Farmers warn they may be unable to plant or harvest and one servo owner says the situation is ‘day‑to‑day’.

item.title: Twist for Sydney man who was accused over threat to kidnap Prime Minister Anthony Albanese
item.description: The 27-year-old is also accused of performing an offensive salute.

item.title: Three girls caught on camera in alleged shocking bullying attack at a Sydney school
item.description: The disturbing clip appears to show a girl being dragged by the hair and told to ‘smile at the camera’.

item.title: NRL legend Nathan Merritt fighting for life after devastating double cancer diagnosis
item.description: The 42-year-old father-of-five has vowed to ‘stay alive as long as possible’.

item.title: Princess Catherine cancer diagnosis: Royal shares rare update about life after remission during visit to Borough Market
item.description: ‘It’s something I have to be a lot more conscious of now.’

item.title: Influencer Nadia Bartell's $3 million post-divorce property returns to the market
item.description: Price suggests potential break-even sale for the star

item.title: Melbourne: World's Best City is also it's biggest property bargain
item.description: Is a harbour view really worth an extra $600,000 to buyers?

item.title: Childcare provider fined after two‑year‑old found unresponsive at Queensland centre
item.description: An investigation uncovered several areas of non‑compliance, prompting legal action.

item.title: Tyson Stengle situation begins to clear as Cats make early declaration on AFL comeback timeline
item.description: Geelong coach Chris Scott has shared an update six weeks after his star forward’s return from personal leave.

item.title: Teen dies after stolen car crashes at 180km/h in Hoppers Crossing, Melbourne
item.description: The Skoda was driving up to 180km/h when it crashed in Melbourne with four teens fleeing the scene and their dying friend.

item.title: Measles case sparks alert after infectious person dined at popular Sydney eateries
item.description: Officials warn the virus may already be circulating in the community.

item.title: Tributes flow after Melbourne Olympics hero Ron Delany dies aged 91: ‘Colossus of Irish athletics’
item.description: The famous race inside the MCG ended with a legendary moment of Australian sportsmanship.

item.title: Vigil held for mum and baby as haunting CCTV shows beloved teacher Kate Paterson and daughter April hours before deaths
item.description: Footage shows the family on a normal outing before they were found dead in their home.

item.title: AFL great Mark Thompson makes popular return to MCG spotlight ahead of Essendon’s season opener
item.description: The premiership hero has capped off a significant fortnight with an appearance in front of a big crowd.

item.title: Breakthrough as suspect arrested over Adelaide chef found fatally injured near home.
item.description: Caleb Leriano’s injuries were found ‘not consistent’ with a collision.

item.title: Alex Johnston breaks try-scoring record as thousands of NRL fans storm Allianz Stadium to celebrate Rabbitohs hero
item.description: Thousands jumped the fence immediately after the South Sydney veteran scored the historic try.

item.title: Zach Merrett suffers brutal ‘what if’ as Essendon smacked by Hawthorn in AFL season opener
item.description: ‘You’d just love to know what’s going through his mind at the moment.’

item.title: Nervy Matildas hold off North Korea to reach Asian Cup semi-finals
item.description: Sam Kerr produced ‘a real captain’s performance’ as the Aussies defied a mountain of pressure to progress.
